Environment facts:
- First collect the Debian release and service state with read-only checks.

Evidence:
- Run `scripts/collect-env.sh` and `scripts/systemd-diagnose.sh nginx.service`.
- Include DLR-SYS evidence from `systemctl status`, `systemctl cat`, and `journalctl`.

Safe next checks:
- Validate the nginx config before changing anything.

Proposed changes:
- Requires user approval. Back up the changed config, apply one change, then verify with `systemctl status nginx`.
